final:
module RefModule (
	input clk,
	input rst,
	input en,
	output reg [3:0] count
);

  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
	if (rst) begin
		count <= 4'd0;
	end else if (en) begin
		count <= count + 4'd1;
	end
end

endmodule
